/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -w -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mlbterm.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/mlbterm.dir/src/Schedule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlbterm.dir/src/Standings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlbterm.dir/src/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlbterm.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlbterm.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o bin/mlbterm  -Wl,-rpath,/home/raf/Documents/mlbterm/build/_deps/cpr-build/cpr:/home/raf/Documents/mlbterm/build/_deps/curl-build/lib -lncurses -lpanel _deps/cpr-build/cpr/libcpr.so.1.12.0 _deps/curl-build/lib/libcurl.so.4.8.0
